title: alangium hollrungii
intro: Alangium hollrungii, also known as the Indonesian alangium or East Timorese alangium, is a species of plant in the family Alangiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Alangium hollrungii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, as well as its ability to improve digestion and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and made into tea, infusions, or capsules, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
